Title: Professional Portrait Retouching for Corporate Headshots
Brief Description: Retouch 50 corporate headshot portraits to achieve professional, polished appearance while maintaining natural look and authenticity.
Background: We're providing professional headshot services for corporate clients. Your retouching will enhance the portraits while maintaining authenticity and professional standards. The goal is to make subjects look their best while preserving their natural appearance.
Objectives: Ensure consistent quality across all images

Step-by-Step Instructions.instruction:
Skin Retouching: 
 - Remove blemishes, acne, and temporary skin imperfections 
 - Smooth skin texture while preserving natural pores and features 
 - Even out skin tone and reduce redness 
 - DO NOT remove moles, freckles, or permanent features 
 - Maintain natural skin texture and avoid over-smoothing

Eye Enhancement: 
 - Brighten and enhance eye whites naturally 
 - Sharpen eyelashes and eyebrows 
 - Remove under-eye circles and bags 
 - Enhance eye color subtly 
 - Ensure eyes remain natural and engaging

Hair and Beard: 
 - Clean up stray hairs and flyaways 
 - Enhance hair texture and shine 
 - Tame unruly hair while maintaining natural flow 
 - Groom beards and mustaches professionally 
 - Maintain natural hair color and texture

Color Correction: 
 - Adjust white balance for natural skin tones 
 - Enhance overall color harmony 
 - Ensure consistent lighting across face 
 - Maintain professional color palette

Technical Requirements.Tool: Use Adobe Photoshop or equivalent professional software
Technical Requirements.Format: Save in both PSD (layered) and high-quality JPEG formats

Quality Standards: Consistent retouching quality across all images
Success Metrics: Complete all 50 portraits within time limit
Review Checklist: Skin retouching is natural and professional
Eyes are enhanced without being artificial
Hair and beard are groomed professionally
Color correction is accurate and natural
Professional lighting and color balance achieved
